zh.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II是Pons FitzSimon的兒子，於1162年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托金頓。他和Julianna de Bardolf至少有3個兒子。他去世於1222年4月4日在英國格盧斯特斯爾托金頓享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II was born in 1162, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England as the son of Pons FitzSimon. He had at least 3 sons with Julianna de Bardolf. He died on 4 April 1222, in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II est né en 1162, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, fils de Pons FitzSimon. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Julianna de Bardolf. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1222, à Tockington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II wurde 1162 in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, als Sohn von Pons FitzSimon geboren. Er hatte mit Julianna de Bardolf mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 4. April 1222 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Tockington, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II è nato il nel 1162 nel Tockington, Gloucestershire, England come figlio di Pons FitzSimon. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Julianna de Bardolf. Morì il 4 aprile 1222, nel Tockington, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz IIは1162年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンでPons FitzSimonの息子として生まれた。彼はJulianna de Bardolfとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1222年4月4日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトクイントンで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II(은)는 1162년 영국 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 Pons FitzSimon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Julianna de Bardolf(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1222년 4월 4일 영국 그루스스터실르 톡잉턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II nasceu em 1162, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra filho de Pons FitzSimon. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Julianna de Bardolf. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1222, em Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II родился в 1162 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия. Его отца звали Pons FitzSimon. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Julianna de Bardolf. Он умер 4 апреля 1222 г. в местности токкингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Poyntz II nació en 1162, en Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra como hijo de Pons FitzSimon. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Julianna de Bardolf. Murió el 4 de abril de 1222, en Tockington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
